reason: All acceptance criteria verified. ConversationState enum has all 7 states (IDLE, INTENT_DETECTED, SLOT_FILLING, AWAITING_CONFIRMATION, PROCESSING, RESOLVED, ESCALATED). DialogueSlot(name/value/required/prompt) frozen dataclass. DialogueState frozen with conversation_id/current_state/slots/turn_count/last_updated. transition() returns new immutable instance, turn_count+=1, last_updated=NOW. missing_slots() returns required slots with value=None. FSM transitions match spec. Invalid transitions raise ValueError. All 42/42 tests pass. Coverage 100%.
